[{"Name":"Mochi Coco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKr_cKOGTuVQdp8Gq9W5fBYwfDtLxt8RkJiJJTz9K1OHzl1yQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Exceptional care for our heritage home!

I am truly grateful to have worked with Roof Doctor and highly recommend them. They worked on our heritage house in Kelowna, and from start to finish, the experience was smooth, trustworthy, and very reassuring.

I would especially like to thank Dave, who was an absolute pleasure to work with. He was kind, patient, and always took the time to explain things clearly. Caring for a heritage property requires extra attention and responsibility, and Dave handled everything with great respect and professionalism. His thoughtful communication and steady support gave me real peace of mind throughout the process.

The roofing work was done beautifully, and all inspections and required documentation were handled carefully and properly. It meant a lot to know that our heritage home was in such capable and honest hands.

Thank you, Dave, and thank you to the entire Roof Doctor team. I truly appreciate your dedication and integrity, and I would gladly recommend you to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ken Clarke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKNRLlUN9iLTCItwgBS-IUd7KrjlHPjOdxw2Y3Siv7_7juxrQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Extremely efficient and highly skilled installers led by Leo and his crew. We highly recommend the Roof Doctor.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hot Welder","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTFUcSypOFrCcVicAiNzvgxsH4svTIHjPb-XrLw2AJJUV8J3I=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was looking for a roofing contractor to re-roof my daughter's house in Kelowna. Initially spoke with Dave Ferguson, when picking up coffee one morning.

He gave me a contact at their nearby shop and I then spoke with Howard, and indicated that my daughter's home was in urgent need of a new roof and winter was almost here.

He promptly provided a comprehensive quote, addressing our additional needs; exhaust vent, and carport re-roof as well.

I had spoke with a couple of other roofers prior, but their pricing and warranty didn't come close.

The contract was signed and his crew showed up within a couple of days as promised and had both roofs stripped, substrate repairs & ice damming protection done, and re-roof completed within a few days. All construction debris was cleaned up the following day.

All in all, great service at a great price.
Many Thanks to Howard and the Roof Doctor Team!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"King Cee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJc5i6nWpFdBJS1vUGKmwcSPSxdmlRlN_uBk5cIO-AxK7UUuQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Okanagan Jewish Community Centre thanks Howard and his staff at Roof Doctor for their work on our building. [{"Name":"Viola Cohen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJP5sfHeOIOYvng7DC5P8yQBaeVdvy6VPI0OU3Ana9Y-VYgsPP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently had the pleasure of working with Jaden and Nathan for our house lights. The entire process was incredibly seamless from start to finish, and the lights look amazing! We are very pleased with the final product, which only took about two days to install, as well as the fantastic customer service Nathan and his team provided. They had great attention to detail, which I appreciated. There are no random wires hanging about my house, and they also tucked the interior wires away nicely. I would highly recommend Nathan and his team to do your permanent lights!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC5n9RbeuG7jHp15g__GK8m&fid=0x0:0x45646945a4fb5a26"],"When":"2026-1-27"},{"Name":"Jeff Mills","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHE8T0xg77cHmf6a39VS2OMezYaWCorc_Q5mi4V1E6a3iJPrU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an excellent experience with OK Roof Revival. From start to finish, they were exceptionally professional, knowledgeable, and easy to deal with. There was absolutely no sales pressure just a clear, honest assessment and a very detailed, well-prepared quote.

What I really appreciated was the in-person experience. It was refreshing to deal with a real person who took the time to come to my home, walk through everything face to face, and answer questions without rushing or pushing a sale. It was simply straightforward, respectful communication.

I ultimately decided to postpone the work for a year or two, and they were completely understanding and professional about it. That level of candor and respect really stood out. I’ll absolutely be reaching out to OK Roof Revival when the timing is right and would confidently recommend them to anyone looking for honest, professional service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chanelle D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCEGtGi_rnAXcez2UGfi8tPvkrtnC3uoCyaDz_NpX-tJAfWp2A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Hired OK Roof Revival to clean the moss off my roof. They were the most reasonably priced. They sent me a very extensive proposal with options to choose from. It looked very professional. They did a good job but the only two issues I had: 1) Communication leading up to the appointment. I didn't receive a confirmation so I really wasn't sure if they were coming. So, I reached out to confirm. 2) The gutter on one side of my house was not cleaned. How can I tell? There was a plant growing that was there before and after the gutter cleaning. However, I called them and they came to clean it then took pictures to show me the evidence of the cleaning. What I liked is 1) their presentation and 2) the photos they shared with me on the job after it was done. 3) They also did some asphalt repairs and 4) provided additional recommendation for extending the lifetime of the asphalt. Overall, very good and the most competitive per square inch price for roof cleaning.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCxrevL3cFvh4aP3B8Q3Tdr&fid=0x0:0x45646945a4fb5a26"],"When":"2025-10-15"},{"Name":"Cayla Stiles-Clark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKvhd8dT-j3vDJygLh9Cndn3MuaOQLuFzW7d8ovI7fcoEV8vYB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Came across OK Roof Revival at a local home show in February after experiencing a roof leak (that got worse shortly after the initial interaction). They then came to my house a few weeks later and did a drone over with photos. They presented me with a detail account of my roof's condition and gave me affordable options.

It did then take several weeks for someone to come to the island to do the in person inspection, but that was very reasonable. They were able to schedule my home shortly afterwards for the repair and rejuvenation.

My only issues were with communications and issues with the financing after the repair. After the initial presentation, I kept having to follow up to get a set answer.

And then communications broke down when they had to reschedule the repair (was supposed to a Thursday and rescheduled to Sunday afternoon) I was ok with the reschedule after I rearranged my schedule for the Sunday. Then I received multiple appointment emails the day before (Saturday) kept changing the time on Sunday. While this was going on, a worker showed up on the Saturday to stage the day before the repair was scheduled and we were not home. We really didn't know what was going on. A call later, from Cameron, resolved the confusion.

The repair itself was well done as well as the rejuvenation. They did a beautiful job on my roof. It looks fantastic. They supplied before, during and after pictures.

It did take a few days to get the final invoice cleared up as the wrong financing was set up but it was fixed by their office within a week of the completion of the repair.

All in all, it was a good experience and I would still recommend them over any local roofing company. (and I did have 2 other roofers look at my roof who were useless).

Thank you OK Roof Revival for all that you have done.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKOr9riNncPcDA&fid=0x0:0x45646945a4fb5a26"],"When":"2025-6-3"},{"Name":"Wes Winger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI95cV-vMjfVwkB1PwapDfOjHHnakKsYX_LrO8asM75a2fM2A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Had a great initial meeting/consultation with the owner. Contracted Ok Roof Revival to Revive and seal the roof.  Only completed the revival not the sealant portion (perhaps miscommunication).  Had all sorts of trouble getting the warranty document (more disclaimers than warrantable items).  Clean up was minimal but the biggest complaint was dealing with the Sales Manager Dan M.  Rude and pompous!!!   If you  contract with them, make sure you take your own before and after pictures!!!!  Cameron (the owner) smoothed things over.  I would deal with Cameron again!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"P Hewko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZ-UHhSNZ5NjBK6SzQjmUThyiZAISXWDNzw_yMKBx9PMgilw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Found a leak sunday night, called OK Roof Revival monday morning, they came out same day, flew a drone over my house, assesed the issue, came out tuesday with materials and made the necessary repairs. Professional and reasonably priced. Cam and Dan were awesome to deal with.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shelley Grandy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJg85stq-59AXx0zI-IfmXFsmyZbCyMiYQjT_kQVWOvaLwJng=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The appraisal of the roof was very detailed with lots of pictures (via drone) and factual information, making it a comfortable decision to go ahead and have the roof refurbished.  The crew that came out was very pleasant to deal with and they took great care to protect the surrounding landscaping.  The roof looks great and we would have no problem whatsoever recommending this company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pablo Yele","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJlTh8Hc7T5QiOHooZN01wKCoYmFXRxLsdeUxjZ-dVcnnNFTg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kirk and his team did an excellent job, going the extra mile is an understatement. They are top notch would recommend.  5 stars isn’t enough","Images":null,"When":""}]

We had some occasional storm damage, and they were quick to respond and repair, even 15 years after the original work.
Pinnacle provided us with a clear quote, with details about options that were available.  When we chose to proceed, they communicated clearly about timelines and expectations.  Their crew was efficient, polite, safety-conscious, and very respectful of us and our property. They left the worksite tidy and clean every day. The work was completed on time and without any inconvenience to us.
Pinnacle did two inspections upon completion, one to ensure everything was completed to specifications and that everything was cleaned up, and a second by a manager came to ensure it was finished professionally.  We were then provided with a final bill which was clear and accurate, with no surprises.

We had a serious roof leak on a new roof that was done on a different home We own.  Our insurance would not cover the repairs due to an inspection that discovered the company that did it,  did not do around the flashings and vents correctly, causing the failures that caused the leak. 3 company's were called to provide quotes and timeline for completion. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Lisa Marini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBeTMf-SBr9XhibBSBiilcOkNnDXs7srYxuMdlbFH7z_VIgWqfwA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I do not recommend Stutters for any restoration needs. They lack professional courtesy, and have very poor communication skills. Their on site employees, specifically Travis, was amazing! He was professional and a very thorough employee.

We were without an entire kitchen for 2months before I told them we needed at least the old counter and sink reinstalled. Ever tried washing dishes in a 3” deep bathroom sink? I have…

They left all their abatement trash beside my house for 2 months. Yes, I requested they come grab it when I asked for the counter and sink. They left the entirety of the old kitchen outside on my back deck for 4months. The “project manager” Jeremiah, who had only been to our house ONCE, had said that the cabinets were fine to spend that time exposed to the elements and that his “10yrs of red seal experience” stated as such. My husband was a framer, my brother a contractor, my dad a building inspector and my son is also a contractor. ALL of them stated that it is not acceptable. During this time, my husband went for emergency back surgery. We had to set up a bed in our garage for him to recover on because our rec room was FULL of the boxes and items stutters put in there. As a disabled veteran, with a husband who has had emergency back surgery, I’m just blown away at how flippant they were towards us and our unique situation.

Their billing was also incorrect, and I had to go over it several times to have it corrected. We were being charged for things they never did. I do have phone recordings, emails and pictures. They should also have the email chains.

I decided to write this review after waiting 2 weeks for an email reply from any of the 3 separate employees of Stutters to answer a basic question…..where did they come up with their quote number for our counter top so that I could get it through there too. I have been unable to find anyone able to replace our counter top for the cost quoted by Stutters. We have been dealing with them since JUNE!!!

My husband and I have been able to finish reinstalling our kitchen, minus the counter top.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCChx2A70u_HqOxJodPnpD7&fid=0x0:0x1311490618766ddd"],"When":"2025-12-3"},{"Name":"celeste1 Fabris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL80aca6EJvaQK3P707mUYXgt6q4SYjJFb9wzUGXEBEF_ZIGg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"When a restoration company is needed with a home, the circumstances are stressful and overwhelming.
However we are extremely pleased and appreciative for our recent experience with Stutters (Penticton location) and specifically Matt Wilkinson and his team.
Matt and his team were professional,  communicated effectively and in a timely manner through emails, texts and telephone calls, they kept us up to date on the restoration, provided timelines they adhered to, were flexible and worked closely with us to ensure timelines worked for our family, and they ensured high quality work was completed to restore the home to its original state.
I highly recommend Stutters for any restoration work you may require.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tamara Mcpherson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI5fUnACd7m3ykE85WtW9afNtKZr2G-bEhMy5MTbthGJDl1wQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience with Stutters Restorations was great! From Sheree in the office to Mike in repairs. Also the pick up team Draeden and Braeden as well as my crew that helped me move back in - Tamara, Bruce, Cole, Max, Richard and the lovely Bell! Everyone was amazing thank you for making my move in easy and pleasant!! I appreciate all your efforts.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christine Hartley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVADHgimU41Xh7WNtSf_ydqMBuia5XkYliMYpEJCgsrFbp-P1w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So glad I called Stutters I had a leak in Kitchen and I was able to get help within 30 minutes and Toby Dreden and Breaden were amazing every time they said they were going to attend the house they were there and on time they were very attentive. They did a great job  on the clean up !….also Sheree was fantastic in meeting and organizing what needed to be done…. Personal and professional This is my second issue and both times I’ve called STUTTERS and both were consistently fantastic!!…..going forward. I’ll always choose them first thanks guys for helping us in our time of need I’m  so happy. There’s people out there like you that  really care. Which makes me believe that truly is the culture at Stutters.
Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Darcy Nybo (Writing Coach)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyGVl6_1o2GsoK-rcYqjct3I_KvmXmEjIwpqKf2NDRjJ7Yr1Dg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"First off - they did a GREAT job. The coordinator was fabulous and for the most part, so were the workers. However, the older guy said he was "retiring soon" and didn't seem to really care that he was leaning underlay against a painting of mine. The other fellow who did 90% of the work was a pleasant man and he did a good job, but he smoked, a lot, and my house smelled like stale smoke for weeks afterward.  Again, great job! but ... as above.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Penny Ruby","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFsN1566sx2sGuy693mTNHZzy3WUzx6xolayNgZbL7LeuPFB0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Matt, our project manager, and his team were highly responsive to help us address the emergency portion of our flood damage.  Matt was also very thorough and patient with the restoration process, helping us work through the insurance side of our claim.  We truly appreciate all of the professional trades provided to complete the restoration!
We have no hesitation with using or recommending Stutters Restoration in the future.
Thanks Matt!!
Ross and Sharon Manning","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ed Bleackley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLbH70FDGzVfFzsHYd6kK-aFRa7PPAvSewJW-QJJW2FIwwoXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An accident in our home caused a flood in our laundry room and the bedroom situated directly below. Needless to say the cabinets in the laundry room and the bedroom sets were destroyed.  We call Stutters for assistance and the service we received exceeded all of our expectations.  Everyone involved in the repairs and restoration of our home were very professional and brought a high level of expertise, subsequently our home is in better shape now than it was before the accident.  Thank you  to Matt and his team at Stutters.

Ed Bleackley","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gail Tritscher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLVWUyKwrHXgzb0kgNeqytNF9B1g_oYtYbHTqhlJiJ302LAGg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an issue with water ingress from our roof by noticing a stain on the ceiling.  I called the roofer who installed the roof and was told they were 4-6 weeks out for repairs.  Called Stutters as they had looked after a basement flood for us before.  By the end of the day a project manager was on site, contacted a few roofers and the roofers were at our home the next day for a temporary fix to ensure no more leaks and arrangements were made for the permanent repair.  I would recommend Stutters in a heartbeat.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Chance and his crew were highly recommended by a family friend who is also in the roofing business.

[{"Name":"Chelsey Gill","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK2M8xE02QiA31bCl4uK5P_qxW_yG-BJM-3mojoOvGJd1204MU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our journey with ARG began after one of the most terrifying events of our lives. Our family woke to discover our home was on fire, and while we were incredibly grateful to escape safely, we lost our home in an instant. What followed was an overwhelming and emotional process — from demolishing what remained of our house to navigating a complex and exhausting insurance rebuild.

From day one, Adam, Dan, and the entire ARG team showed up with compassion, professionalism, and unwavering support. They didn’t just build us a house — they helped rebuild our sense of security and hope. They went to bat for us with our insurance company, helped problem-solve every obstacle, and made us feel genuinely supported through every high and low.

ARG brings together an exceptional team — from draftspeople and designers to skilled trades — ensuring every detail is handled with care. Nothing is overlooked, and the result is a home that feels truly custom and perfectly suited to our family.

Throughout the entire process, ARG brought clarity, clear communication, and an incredible level of craftsmanship. Today, we are living in a home that is more beautiful than we ever imagined — so amazing it still doesn’t feel real that we get to call it our home.

We are beyond grateful to Adam, Dan, and the entire ARG team. If you’re looking for a construction team that truly shows up for their clients — especially during life’s hardest moments — we cannot recommend ARG highly enough.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jason M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqCl8iX8asJik_Zt5zLcDxAVfKt9XFPYlRcqNUZPE4Glh9fQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"ARG Contracting recently completed a substantial renovation of our home that included a kitchen, 1 half bath, 2 full baths, a stairwell, and new flooring, doors, baseboard, paint, lighting, electrical, and millwork throughout the home.

The renovation commenced in April of 2024 and was substantially complete by mid-July, which is fairly remarkable considering we didn't even have finalized design drawings in hand until the second week of May.

During the renovation, we visited the home frequently to check on the work, we found the personnel working for ARG Contracting (and their subcontractors) to be very pleasant and professional, answering any questions we had, always maintaining a clean work site, and being respectful of our community and neighbours.

As the work was reaching substantial completion, ARG Contracting, especially Dan, exerted considerable effort in making sure everything was absolutely perfect.

From a cost perspective, we ended up exactly where we expected to be. We found ARG Contracting to be competitive in their pricing and communicative when it came to making any decisions that would have impacted cost or schedule.

We would encourage anyone considering renovations or a new home build to reach out to Adam, his passion for customer service during our introductory meeting is what ultimately convinced us to go with ARG Contracting, and this same passion remained present throughout construction.

Honorable mention for Dan who did an amazing job coordinating all the trades, holding them accountable, checking their work, and personally taking care of so many details to ensure that the work was completed to virtual perfection.

ARG Contracting will be back this fall to complete a master bath renovation project for us.

Thanks Adam and Dan!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID7k5yExQE&fid=0x0:0x8c5c32a421e45976"],"When":"2024-8-28"},{"Name":"Jordan Tomizza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUE3ZOH-iT8ph2tiBkET8egJAzBhwsXPYBKR3-HXZx8L_fsAcZkNw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just finished a basement reno with ARG. The quality of the work is top-tier and the finished space looks exactly how we envisioned it. Adam was incredibly easy to work with, professional, and chill throughout the entire process. Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Egnite Sustainability Inc","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7EpGaSypbofI42imlWa4MElZiqw8mdjRu61MPbF_ZA3cFoBAx=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The team at ARG Contracting delivers exceptional results from start to finish. Their workmanship consistently exceeds industry standards for both quality and energy performance, setting a benchmark in the Kelowna area. What truly sets ARG apart is their professionalism and communication — they keep every detail clear, on time, and well-coordinated throughout the process.

ARG has built a strong network of trades and consultants, and it shows in the caliber of homes they produce. Every project reflects careful planning, expert execution, and a genuine commitment to excellence. If you’re looking for a contractor who values integrity, energy efficiency, and client satisfaction, ARG Contracting is a top choice.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gail Jones","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL_GA-uYPWioEURSPPr6Tc3Qo9sxa-mhs0Zhj5xYLhj1jAyaQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After losing our lovely home in the McDougall Creek wildfire, we chose ARG to help us move on with our lives and rebuild our forever home. The outstanding construction team guided us through the project from beginning to end.  From Mandy helping us with details of our destroyed home for our insurance providers to Corinne guiding us through the plans for our new home, and Adam coming to bat for us with the insurance company, we felt supported by good people throughout the difficult and emotional process.
The staff and contractors on the job were all professional, courteous and available to chat and explain the processes they were attending to on the construction. We found the quality throughout to be exceptional. Dan was especially helpful as he oversaw our rebuild with attention to detail, positive interactions and timely responses to our questions and requests.
Adam, Dan and their team did a great job from beginning to the end of our rebuild.  We absolutely love our beautiful new home and are grateful to ARG for bringing our vision to life!!
We highly recommend ARG for any of your construction projects.
Don and Gail Jones","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ryan Hosaki","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJi1eTUdzCuIMiSMunJI5kdCXumdXZlwOLb3UjnEIw9PBAEKw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Working with ARG is such a pleasure! Too often they give you a price but that soon changes once they start the job. I own a number of properties and won't go anywhere else after dealing with Unit Roofing. They saved me thousands of dollars with superior workmanship, communication and knowledge. They are well spoken, intelligent and professional. They went well beyond the expected with extras. We went to one of their sites to check their work first, so I don't have any issue with anyone driving by the property where they did the roof and facia on. 784 Burne Ave. I know you will be impressed as well. The larger companies often contract out their work to others or are too busy to do a good job. You won't find that here. Only excellence. Not for one second will you feel like a number. My tenants loved them as well. They truly do care and take such pride in their work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"shelora sheldan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUyL6JQww46fMTqVHkLQLh8gnQffmc9U5WLYmR0u1GUWR4j8OX=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Buyer Beware!!! Needing to replace the roof of our flat-top house in Penticton, we received a glowing review of Unit Roofing from a neighbour who had hired John and his partner Richelle to do the replacement roof on their flat-roof house, using Malarkey Omni Seal roofing. And his online reviews were all five stars – praising his communication, hard work, and honesty. So we felt confident proceeding with the project. What transpired from day one was the opposite! In fact this has turned into a nightmare.

While all the other reviews praised John's swift communication, we cannot say enough about the sorry lack of proper and professional communication from him. Once he had our down payment, things went downhill from there. Little to no communication started on the day he was to show up  for the job. We couldn’t get a confirmation from him. For example, his phone’s mailbox was full and there was no response from repeated emails and texts. When he finally responded, he said he would be showing up the first day at 8 AM. 9 AM came around. Then 10 AM. Then 10:30. He showed up closer to 11.

What was promised to be a two day job – with a half third day to tie up loose ends – turned into a four day job. And it’s still unfinished. Promises are at the heart of this deplorable experience. Be aware that John Fitzgerald over-promises and under-delivers! Two examples: a promotional solar vent from his rep was promised but suddenly not available, and his “gutter guy that can do the a solid length of replacement gutter” also never materialized. But so much worse is that John never showed up to put the finishing touches on our new roof. He promised to show up two days after ‘completion’ to do the finishing touches last Thursday, but an email explaining another fiasco at another job – he seems to be plagued with tragedies – he wanted to show up late on the Friday, or giving us a choice, he could come by on the Saturday to “ .... We agreed on Saturday.
Saturday rolled along. We waited all day. He never showed. We couldn’t get a hold of him: mailbox full, no response to emails, no response to texts.

To add insult to injury, what has transpired during this frustrating time was rain. The rain showed pooling along the edge of the back roof slope. The pooling has been caused by the fact that existing flashing from the previous tar-and-gravel roofing was not removed and was creating a dam, retaining water from flowing over into the gutter. Worse, at each corner end, rainwater drips behind the flashing/gutter! My husband had brought this possibility up to John during the roofing job, but John passed it off, saying that the water will flow over the edge into the gutter (wrong!)
We unwisely paid the balance of the payment the day he was finishing up, with his promise to return in two days to tie ends up: heat torch any unsealed edges, caulk flashing, etc. He never showed. Frustrating!

After contacting his partner, Richelle (Office Manager), and John’s mother, who lives in Penticton and had visited the job site several times, he contacted us via text with an angry note, claiming out of the blue that we had already received a $2750 discount and that we would have to pay for any further work. (WHAT? AT NO POINT WAS THERE ANY DISCOUNT DISCUSSED!) And claiming that we were unprofessional in trying to contact him through others. He stated he would show up Sunday (yesterday) at 1 PM. No show. No email, no text, no phone call. No response.

We are sick to our stomachs and completely frustrated that we are now left with an unfinished job, no recourse for compensation and a roof that in all likelihood will have to be repaired. The professionalism that others have experienced with Unit Roofing seems to have withered away.
We have now called another company to help us through this mess!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kelly Rae Stobert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKAPnBqjIwcBL6y0OOM5r0Eb_IFVUAJKED_wQeQFmEwkifuDA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cannot recommend them enough! They worked with me on what I wanted and gave helpful suggestions on what would work best while still being affordable. Never had a mess which since I have 2 small children was so important. Will never use anyone else again. Just excellent! Thanks","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Richard Ivan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8Bs-gNZiBONXHuMeZYigJaeUEO7I3_Qp8bvPRkBvga_F_8fNVzg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The install of our moon tunnel was carried out professionally and we are very happy with the result! [{"Name":"Melody Gartner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocImRiv-2w5jaVrqB0Ze5YmTELhbJD7ru9XY8rmPjwCox2a8Zw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After several years of contemplating replacing the vinyl siding on our 20 year old house and several quotes later my husband and I reached out to wilderness custom exteriors in Kelowna as they were working on a house in our area and we were very impressed with their workmanship and how tidy the jobsite was.
They were quick to get in touch with us regarding a quote. Jim the owner was very pleasant to deal with and great at answering our questions.
Within two weeks we had our quote which was very comparable to our previous quotes. We decided to go ahead and set up a date in March of this year for them to remove the old vinyl siding and replace it with James Hardie.
Our installer Jimmy was terrific to work with as he was very knowledgable and he takes great pride in his work. Jimmy does great work and he did his best to ensure that we were happy at the end of the day. Any questions or concerns we had were quickly dealt with.
We would highly recommend Wilderness to anyone looking at changing their exterior and highly recommend Jimmy as an installer. Wilderness says that they stand behind their workmanship and the products they install and I truly believe they will as Jim the owner is very much so about customer satisfaction and was great to deal with.
As you can see from the before and after photos our house looks amazing.
The wood soffit under the upper and lower decks was such a nice added touch and the decision to put wood at the front door has definitely added warmth, texture and character to our house. We have had so compliments from our neighbours and friends. We are very happy with the end result. Thanks for a job well done Wilderness Custom Exteriors.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICOiOWiygE&fid=0x0:0x9d8158f4daf181c"],"When":"2022-5-31"},{"Name":"sheri dickson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZsWzuR_BCyZTfN8G7XZKq5NPkw2CADS2CYFd7GapL33c59Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So happy with my updated kitchen cabinets

We are so impressed with our "new" home!!  Thank you!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nicole Waidman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLq1AAWyhFvCRCYujU-xNuXfmN_J4eHWzAY_y5vWFyLV_y0fw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We hired Wilderness for our exterior renovation which included removal of our old vinyl siding, a new roof, new hardie plank siding and shake siding, wood soffits and more. Darryl always kept us in the loop on the project and was there to oversee everything.  Overall they were a great company to work with and we were very impressed with everyone that worked on our project.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gerry Whittaker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIkHLkdvVtikYlWOxXmmzTqX37qtoJJM-KoKiqTxcFGg_0SrQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wilderness Custom Exteriors was a pleasure to collaborate & work with in order to reside and completely refurbish the exterior of our house. Kudos to the entire Wilderness team, including the head honcho Jim, office manager Debbie, foreman Darrel, designers Cindy and Lisa, painter Rick, and installers Vance and Jake!  Thanks to them, our house looks brand new.  We are very pleased with the results, glad we hired Wilderness to revitalize our home, and highly recommend this company.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Garrett Hamilton - Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWoCObaIswv6_q3o5xIMYP9N_9FQiAkdtAOBADQqYMyDgWN6LMW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Edited Review (original below)
After <4yr I have a leak, Ryder will not return any attempt I have made to contact them over the last several weeks. They state a 10 year workmanship guarantee on their contracts but are not honouring this, nor even communicating with me to find any resolution. This is unacceptable for a company to not stand by their work.  I no longer recommend Ryder Roofing.

This is the first time I've had to get a roof re-shingled and Ryder was a great company to deal with. They were prompt to quote and the price with inline with other outfits.  Their product (landmark shingles) was well reviewed so I was confident in the quality of the materials used.  The staff were very friendly, and they worked very hard to get my roof fixed in December.  I would definitely recommend Ryder Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kathy Kraushar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6-ty5ZmB4oHsf6pamoHJBk8tjX9ylMCwZvCIL32BOlO-3wB4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Have been leaving numerous messages for Ryder to call me, they had replaced our entire commercial roof 3 years ago (w warranty) and apparently do not answer their messages.....also, I thought I would try their emergency number as our roof is leaking & the emergency number they give out on their answering machine is a young lady who has nothing to do with Ryder Roofing ....so NO emergency number available after all.    Not impressed.  Ryder's phone message says "your call is important to us", but apparently not if it is about problem w their work, ONLY if it is for new work for them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mathieu Cloutier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKQ7HeO4vjSgSf3WXFRfz3HhBQMjPaPC_7_1qRTSlk5WMJDcg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was not sure about what company to use for my client. I had heard mixed reviews about this company but I decided to give them a try. I was not let down, they did a great job and the job was completed in the estimated time at a reasonable price!! I recommend Ryder roofing to anyone looking for an easy and efficient roofing experience!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vine Design","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNhfyBBBd00XNCLSf03tTyvW7z8UKaY8RcuGbUAnoTv_0LEImF=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am so happy with the quality and professional service I received during my new roof installation.
From the office staff to the friendly and professional roofers who were also quick, tidy and respectful around my yard. I couldn't be more satisfied. Nice job Ryder Roofing guys!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Liz W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKm1zbhNdxW5vjVhdprklcCp4Sxelh1dk_DFKY-QSaVyv7eYQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Beware!!! Ryder Roofing has a terrible reputation and anyone who works in the construction industry knows that their work cannot be trusted. They are unethical and will take advantage of you if given the opportunity...when you call to claim something under the supposed "warranty" that they give you, don't expect a call back because it's not going to happen. This is a poorly run business by people who are dishonest. I had them replace a roof and when I called & emailed them to ask some questions about the methods they used, the number of roof vents required according to code, etc, they never returned my calls or emails, even after leaving numerous messages. If you do business with them, you'll surely regret it. Look them up on the Better Business Bureau website and you'll see that their rating has been revoked because of their poor business practices.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Victor Nishi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIVc0ZvsJdlr5mqdlurCjjiRKA_Tw8Mu5B8AeFCwR7cwc3EyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I don't normally comment on companies but this one warranted some warning to other people.

I have use this company for commercial work twice this year and had good service. But...

Arranged to install roof top curbs and jacks and had scheduled date. Roofers didn't show up so called them to see what was up.
Got told I was to phone a day in advance to confirm which was not the case. I told him this was not what we agreed in an earlier conversation. The guy told me to find someone else and hung up.

The person who I was talking to was the owner of the company.  Would give zero stars but site will not allow.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steve h","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKkUsE4BfXAoeTGyg0ZMUMf0U6R3-WRiArL6STQM6U89frlEQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had my roof reroofed in 2016 and the instalation was ok but not done the way I wanted. The roof started leaking thru the soffit mid summer 2020 and when I got home in October I called and called left messages and it was not till March when the owner came by to look at it and said they would be back to repair soon. We'll its nearing the end of June and no service and can't get a reply from my messages left. DO NOT USE this company  niw my roof has rotted back one foot from the facia and has rotted the facia and the ends if the roof joists. Niw what I'm going to have to get someone else to repair my roof and bill it back to Ryder, GOOG LUCK.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hsiaopin Lo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWIJ9M8jULm6stcMStRAL421svk9cDhPMT0cU1IjuT2Ka6AHoI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This company took $23 504.25 as deposit from my parents for a metal roofing on Sept. 20, 2019 but as of today May 28, 2020 the owner Ryder Greg delayed and did not call us back when the job will be done and did not bother responding. Their secretary does not know where to find the owner and my parents are under duress. We are in the process of taking legal action but mean while everything is pending. Avoid at all cost this roofing company, they are fraudulent, a scam and take advantage of elderly. Do not rely on average stars rating, I am sure the good rating is given by himself.","Images":null,"When":""}]

We were looking for expert guidance on a commercial project, requiring in-depth discussion, design programming, and management. open_hours: {"Friday":["8 a.m.–4:30 p.m."],"Monday":["8 a.m.–4:30 p.m."],"Saturday":["Closed"],"Sunday":["Closed"],"Thursday":["8 a.m.–4:30 p.m."],"Tuesday":["8 a.m.–4:30 p.m."],"Wednesday":["8 a.m.–4:30 p.m."]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Dave","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUtbmObJ6MWiQc3DIcDw-gKIy1ZQ17CdOsj0IZ0nKFc8XU36lHE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Callahan is one of the few truly ethical property owners out there.  When I first moved into the building, at my request they completely overhauled my unit with new switches and receptacles, and installed a couple of digital thermostats.  The building was calm and peaceful and frankly I had a great view of the city.  They leave you alone except for when they do their semi-annual inspections and if you have a problem and need them to fix something.  Speaking of which, they get right on things and absolutely fix problems as soon as they arise.

The only reason anyone would give them less than a 5 star review is simply because the cost of living is increasing all across the board and it feels like landlords in general are gouging, when they themselves have to cover massive increases in property taxes and corporate revenue tax.  But a lot of people out there are butthurt over the high cost of rent in Kelowna and it's literally not Callahan's fault.

Erin (company manager) is fantastic and when I suddenly lost my job and couldn't cover rent, allowed me to cobble rent together as best I could until I finally couldn't do it and had to move, to which she helped me with my final month rent by setting up a repayment schedule.  I was able to leave softly, not hard ejection like anyone else would have done.  I was an inch from being on the streets, over Christmas no less.  I feel like Erin/Callahan literally saved me from total disaster.  I did end up having to move out and they helped me immensely figure everything out.

That is not to say they will let you be a fool and commit all kinds of shenanigans.  Don't be that person.  Just know that if you are honest and you take care of your rental, they will take care of you in kind.  I would rent from Callahan first, any day, over some joker of a landlord for whatever Tom Foolery you end up getting tangled up with.

Thank you Erin and because of you I was able to keep on my feet and pushing forward.  Thank you so much!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jacalyn Wyllie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWSC9_taxU-JIRUYFCxZiMwYCujX33UNPDyY-Z8wavUrAtv69i2VQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I rent in one of Callahan’s properties. I’ve been here over 2 years and am extremely pleased with my experience. The on site manager Kaitlin is honestly one of the nicest, friendliest people I know. If you have an issue, she doesn’t take forever to get back. Her response time is so quick. Her and her husband keep the building extremely clean. I feel heard and I feel safe in the building. I have also had the pleasure of speaking with Erin, the property manager. She too has gone above and beyond for any situation. She is friendly, understanding and professional. She also is prompt when it comes to resolving issues. They both deserve 5 stars! Great place!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Angela O'Brien","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI_ZeLQrQQCQpB7bbPbBh03k_jDFuxbjn73IhgER8MK614AKdA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Callahan Property has been amazing to work with over the last 3 years.  We lease a commercial space and our property manager has always been professional and on top of things.  This is easy to do when times are good and I'm so pleased to say that even with all the challenging times 2020 has thrown at business, Callahan has continued to work with us to ensure we all do well!  Esteem Lingerie highly endorses Callahan Property Group","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Skullzz Magee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3dFobLC874Eg0PPtxlcoXxp6y21MFbNhWYKcLshTN-PLKmx8CtQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Absolutely terrible management. Was in a rental unit for 11 years having great relationships with all of the 5 different building manager's, even as far as helping out at times with snow removal, lawn mowing, going for lunch etc..all good up until these people named Mike and Cindy Horyza took over. They had absolutely zero experience in managing a rental building prior they said. When they started I showed them around the building's mechanical rooms etc and offered lots of advice, most they followed and appreciated except for shutting down the buildings fresh air system and closing all the fire doors and propping open the laundry door, all of which is a serious fire code issue. After numerous attempts to rectify the danger to all the tenants, with no action taken I  had to call the fire department and report it. Shortly after I received a phone call from Mike stating that they got into big trouble and was going to cost Callahan alot of money for upgrades etc. I was told to start packing because I was to be on the street real soon. Days later I started getting notices posted to my door claiming people complained about my medical cannabis use that I've had a doctors prescription for for 8 years with not one complaint. I went to the news and Global Okanagan did a story on it (link provided below). After it aired I never heard another word about it except from other tenants in the building thanking me for standing up to the "bullies" or anymore complaints, for exactly one year and one week later (one year grace period), then all the sudden the neighbor below for the past 9 years had been complaining about noise. Never once in 9 years did he file a complaint, to filing 7 different complaints in 2 weeks, 5 of those days I was working out of town. Yes I lived there alone. So these warranted an eviction. I appealed it and lost of course. During the arbitration meeting it seemed like the big boss lady Lora-lie Wagner talked like she was friends with the "judge" like she had done this many many times before and was acquaintances with her, so i knew before it was over that i was going to lose my home of 11 years to lies and greed. So I was given a 48 hour notice to vacate the property. The neighbor below was given a completely renovated suite at the opposite end of the building prior to my eviction, also Mike and Cindy Horyza were fired, yet I still had to go. They sent in the bailiff to do their dirty work as they knew I was being done dirty and couldn't face me COWARDS! ßIt cost them though, ALOT! but has paid off in end. As per rental laws they were unable to significantly raise the rent yearly  so the $900 rent I was paying for the 2 bdrm unit went up to $2000 shortly after my eviction. Callahan Group and Loralie Wagner are very greedy and evil people with ZERO compassion. You've been warned!

https://globalnews.ca/news/2655210/kelowna-medical-marijuana-user-battling-landlord/","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kayla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJRgs_4usRm2wyKnZ4HTbqeakqP_Rqf02so2vWOOznOFI5Gig=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"*Residential building review- have lived here for more than 6 months.

When I email on the behalf of elderly residents they say that they just like to complain and they're not changing things for them.

So all the elderly in my building will continue to be unable to use their walkers to access the elevator, and we will continually have things stolen due to the building not wanting to install ANY security.

Dealing with Colliers and Royal LePage was a MUCH more Professional and Respectful experience; they responded in a more timely manner. They took the time to understand and listen to what type of property I was looking for. Unlike, Callahan which seemingly shut me down and shooed me away before listening to much of what I had to say; presumably due to the fact I wasn't a known franchise.

David inspected the entire roof and advised that the buckled shingles had been improperly installed originally.  He located several other areas on our roof that had similar issues and provided photos prior to commencing work, and subsequent to completing the repairs.  He determined that there had been no water leaking into the garage, however, he remedied a patch of mold at the site and re-painted that section of the ceiling.  David also installed rainwater diverters to channel water away from the fascia and into the gutters, to prevent any wood rot in the fascia.  His service was professional, thorough and courteous.  We highly recommend David and his firm.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lloyd McClelland","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJk5xTxKL3vjw9nAP0_YZgaVU_-Sc5WUBz9qIzYGVOg7AmeEg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our strata hired Dave from Lakeview Roof Service to help us fix a serious issue in our attics that had not been fixed properly by 2 previous companies. We were very impressed with the quality of his service and work. We asked him to come back to put a roof on our pergola!! We do love the improvement to our backyard space!! Highly recommend!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"GDS 1246","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqYJIEedfO-AgdWdeL1k5vmUYkpz7EZs1X-syOg7E5YPxLgA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We hired David @ Lakeview Roofing to do some minor repairs to our roof on a 15 year old house we bought a few months ago. The original roofer neglected to put rain diverters in the roof system and as a result there was some damage to some of the ends of the fascia boards.

From the first call to the completion, David was very professional, friendly and polite. It is obvious he is very knowledgeable about his trade and about roof systems. He returned calls, text messages and emails quickly. He showed up when he said he was going to,  and even called one day well before the time he was to show up to advise he would be a bit late and this was only because of Bridge traffic!!!! This quality of service unfortunately is pretty much non existent nowadays in the trades in Kelowna. And..........his price was good too.

Finding trades in Kelowna with this level of service and work is rare as a lot of trades that we have found since moving here don't even bother responding to emails or phone calls.

I have absolutely no hesitation at all in highly recommending David and his company Lakeview roofing for all your roofing needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cory Hnatiuk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJKWLDCOMZWLKLInDxYX509B32rD7mFiHV7GwdVdNgTLHWY5g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Storm came through and water was leaking from our covered patio. I approved  on the spot and Dave had it completed the same day.
Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Nancy Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJfR_Kn-2Zht1vKq-JzcZ4Y6WkSIX22o3lO7zHJeRoiWuZr3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was a pleasure working with OneWash.    We had our roof done on December 11th.  OneWash worked with us patiently for several weeks while we waited for a snow free day.  I was very pleased because I did not want to wait until the spring.  We worked directly with 3 different employees.  They all had great communication skills.  Due to the 3 year warranty, I feel assured that the moss removal will be effective.  I have no hesitation recommending OneWash.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Casey Evans","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTGkXygMbDcZ2_7JuC-ADPVcvP5YTxoAULYxB3Yc9T27WMWryZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a review that tells the story of how a business deals with a situation where everything doesn't go to plan.

We recently hired Onewash to come and do our windows, gutters, and an exterior softwash of our home.  The crew that showed up was newly hired and didn't do the greatest job.  When I got home from work I did notice a few spots that weren't the greatest but it was a Friday, long week and I thought I would check the rest tomorrow.

Later that evening I got a message from the owner Ben.  He asked me to check the work thoroughly because there had been some complaints about this particular crew not leaving jobs 100% complete to the Onewash standards.  Sure enough when I checked the next day I found several spots that weren't done correctly.

I sent the pictures to the owner Ben and he scheduled one of the their top senior employees to come and fix all the issues.  The gentlemen who came by yesterday was very friendly, very thorough, and went above and beyond to make sure everything was done properly.

This is how you judge a business.  Do they take care of situations when things don't go according to plan.  Onewash showed great integrity in this situation and I wouldn't hesitate to recommend them to others!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCgyRGaXtRoPyrY0xdxyaLc&fid=0x0:0xad7b9c7b1a7c1116"],"When":"2025-8-31"},{"Name":"Veronica Roth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVKc_aGoDoecAO4hsrJ-jRLm-V0NAor-hA_hmAUjLx5yJEgZgd=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best decision I made was trusting One Wash Okanagan with my house. I asked them to remove the moss and treat the roof, soft wash the house, clean the gutters, power wash the patio and wash the windows. Everything is bright and feels new. Ben, Eric and Benny are friendly, professional and very personable. They took care to carefully move the furniture and also to move it back. Ben then did a final walk about with me and made sure I was happy with all the jobs. They are now my go to company for the upkeep of my house.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDHs-ukWQ&fid=0x0:0xad7b9c7b1a7c1116"],"When":"2024-9-19"},{"Name":"John Cullen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLrTEtTDvvcqmTIYg-Bv6ec1xryooITv3EItEOlBPRhwgkJew=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The crew from OneWash showed up as expected and did an amazing job removing moss from my roof. Very happy with the work they did. Would recommend them and would hire again in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristy Towson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUoplQHbt1L28mnl-84uVAM52swasEyvljxhhX0gAH0EiYdNyLG=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ben and his team at One Wash were fantastic. They cleaned our windows, washed our house and sealed our driveway. Our home looked fantastic after! The employees were so friendly and did a great job. They definitely care about the work they do and it shows. I highly recommend One Wash Okanagan!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJrAue2rmcbe0gE&fid=0x0:0xad7b9c7b1a7c1116"],"When":"2025-5-15"},{"Name":"Tony Bucci","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLyE_zJvgWF7nqoy5B89KQ4NOGBsvodWr1N1Je4koQkLMj0DQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ben spent quite a bit of time examining the state of our roof, formulating a plan, and providing all the details.  When the crew arrived to perform the work, they showed a high level of professionalism and care, and returned the next day to fully complete the work.  The crew reviewed the entire job at the end and went to extra lengths to make sure we were 100% satisfied.  Highly recommend OneWash Okanagan","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"doug nott","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcDsbwzU6AdZtfVqdwHi_Xn7jkCPLMz0RFQ8M3tStV0-9xGCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hello, we were reading previous reviews from Ben's clients on cleaning projects he had complete for their homes and had to reach out to him for our home exterior cleaning project.
Ben was very professional from the start set a date and time to review our project and kept us updated on his time of arrival for the meeting.
During our walk through he pointed out some areas, soffits, where he could attempt to clean as he believed he cold get them white once again. Just a note here, we had been told by others that the soffits would be impossible to clean and should be replaced. We agreed for Ben to attempt when he is on site and would work out a price if successful. We agreed to cleaning the roof, gutters, siding, windows and sidewalks on a package price.
Ben will work with you and provides savings on bundled job packages, very fair! We agreed on his price and wanted to schedule, our luck he had an opening next day.
Ben sent a text next morning advising he would be a little later then original time, as he had to pick up some materials on the way to our home. Great communication with his clients at all times. When Ben arrived prior to starting he was courteous enough to go around to the neighbours to let them know what was happening and that it cold be noisy at times while the pressure washer was running. A true professional this young entrepreneur is! We walked through the projects and he let me know which project he would start first and his plan for the final project. He go at it and when it came time to check the ability to clean the soffits he knocked on the door and asked if he could show me, I was amazed how the area he did came out. So much for new soffits being required! Ben worked hard all day in the 32C temperature, he was appreciative of the Gatorade and ice water. When  Ben was finished we did a walk through where he pointed out some issues, one of the front bedroom windows seems to have a broken seal as moisture has previously got inside and streaked the inside glass, some of the exterior paint required touch up on the vinyl siding, we were actually amazed there wasn't more areas as we found out the painting of the vinyl siding was not done correctly. We were impressed with the end product Ben provided us and would highly recommend Clean & Clear Kelowna for anyone looking to have their home exterior cleaned at a reasonable cost! We will be contacting Ben for future exterior cleans when required.
Ben is a professional young entrepreneur and goes that extra bit to work with his clients!
Side note our two 21 month old pups, Bubby & Bleu, thought he was a pretty nice guy as well!
I have attached some pictures of the finished job, unfortunately I don't have any before pics. I believe Ben has posted them on Nextdoor.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICpjsq7WQ&fid=0x0:0xad7b9c7b1a7c1116"],"When":"2023-8-3"},{"Name":"Dave & Stacey Grimes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKiLgqVxzGsO1XjBas7ocUaw92Oe2vhwqkYUlAmd5Z3cswtMA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are very happy with the results!! We had Ben, Matt and Kjell wash our entire house, clean the gutters and clean all outside windows. They worked so incredibly hard in the heat and were a pleasure to deal with. They took extra care to clean the ceiling in the front porch and rid it of spiders. As a side note… thanks guys for being so careful around the robin’s nest on the gable above my garage door! We have 3 sweet baby robins now❤️ see you next year!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICblK_xPQ&fid=0x0:0xad7b9c7b1a7c1116"],"When":"2024-7-23"}]

title: Kelowna Contracting
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"James Clark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVoeqgxPq1_EWNmKwYpj5P_PFdfA9Dqd4JJDbubUwyiD1z81vUo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kelowna Contracting (particularly Adam) went above and beyond for us in a recent renovation job.  We had a tight timeline due to some scheduling issues (our electrician was coming and our first contractor couldn't finish the walls due to another job) ... we reached out to Adam and he offered to work over the weekend (Easter Weekend!) to get the job done.  He was attentive to our requests/needs for the project, scoped it out, and quickly got it done -- it looked fantastic and was completed in a timely manner, all within a reasonable price.  We liked his work so much, we asked him to continue on the job--again, he listened, suggested, and provided great service.  We loved the work and are continuing to work with him (and Kelowna Contracting) on this renovation.  I would definitely recommend him!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Patricia Pfahl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvipRqI5-B9wS0oTdwBh7wRnYkstT7CqXQfL6831jqemrOmxK0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Adam and his team built us a beautiful composite deck last spring.  I couldn’t be more pleased at the final result.  They are creative, innovative, and were flexible to my many changes of mind!  They kept their work site contained and tidied up on a regular basis.   You can see our deck on their website (the picture taken at dusk, with the soft lighting all around the stairs.).
And at the last minute, Adam helped me out by upgrading my messy little irrigation system to a “modern” Bluetooth one.

Thanks, guys.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chance Reid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLw3f9Plg51MadgJQHtkED4PZibZV-3m99jtmQfk033x5cr=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Adam did a great job renovating our second house on our alr property. Great job on the Road creation. foundations. And grading and irrigation for the farm land. Highly recommend. Superior knowledge for real! Don't mess around get the pros in and these guys are top notch. Thanks Adam!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cassie B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCB7uhuw-lhtCwrkxagaTu4UTCLoG4J6MAX2S8m6gd1MkLvyKp3A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kelowna Contracting did an AMAZING job on my family's home. Adam and Mark knew how to execute exactly what we had always envisioned for our back yard, and we couldn't be happier with it. They built a composite deck with a hot tub inside for us. I highly recommend them for carpentry, electrical work, and general construction.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robert Tarrant","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJD_RbpjMe-nHQsaW9NKUGTJ0EYxLLNzBy4HayF-1RDDTSM2w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mark and Adam Lewis are multi-talented.  They took on a wide range of jobs getting our duplex ready for sale.   We initially got them to bring the old wiring up to standard in several suites.  Then they replaced the  roof and guttering and found problems with rot which they replaced as well.  Disposing the old roof was a big job which they handled too.   One suite was particularly bad.  Several floors had to be replaced, the kitchen needed a new countertop and cupboards, the bathroom needed renovating including plumbing and painting.  I did not need to bring in multiple trades.   Mark and Adam did it all.  They selected appropriate the cabinets and got us a new countertop and fridge.  They handled all the transportation and installation and helped save us money by finding parts at ReStore when appropriate.   I would recommend Mark and Adam especially for large jobs that make use of their diverse range of skills.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jordan Chamzuk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ2MZIZeAifpGnMLTbTY7ZjOv765diUNzo9vywIxmepxPOvQg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mark and Adam put in an additional below ground door to our basement. Their work was very thorough and attention to detail was not missed. The final product looks better then we could have imagined! They both remained very transparent with us and asked for our opinion in regards to the finished look. The project was hassel free for us, they took care of everything from permits and supplies to existing house protection and site cleanup.These two put in grueling hours in less then ideal weather conditions and got the job done properly and professionally as it shows in their final work.Would highly recommend kelowna contracting for all your contracting needs!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Duncan Ross","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLrJKS3YjTkxFnwgs1RN3BtxOvqgCdK5sONEqwEX8a_XcDRzg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"These guys are great - very knowledgeable on everything from concrete pouring to lighting design . My job started out as a lighting project which totally transformed my dim home basement into a well-lit , useable space . Decided to go for a basement bedroom addition into this space which was fantastic - best room in the house now , cool custom doors even built on-site .
Concurrent bathroom reno also transformative & enjoyed every day !
I have a rental too that then got trashed in the Merritt flood , but having known the guys from before they actually made the time to come over & totally salvage the wrecked place from bucket brigade mud removal to structural concrete pours , insulation replacement & finishing it to better than before , all in the dead of winter . My tenants were among the first back in in Merritt after the flood , all because of Kelowna Contracting . I totally owe these guys .
Adam & Mark are always  cheerful , prompt , professional . Seem to love their work . Lots of ideas & responsive to yours too . Stuff happens fast when the coveralls are on .
5 stars all the way .
- D Ross , Merritt","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Braedan Richards","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIDvDPSU3VbEAnFYH1HmMwMq2Z81ze9GKFemHd0kQQf46LHVZP=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"my family had hired Kelowna Contracting to renovate our backyard by putting in 2 decks and a dog run. instead what we got were a few piles of dirt and a concrete wall. mark kept on asking for more money and when we couldn't deliver he threatened to walk away from the job. as for the unprofessional behaviour, nobody on the job-site showed up wearing proper footwear, we asked them to keep an area of the top yard untouched (which didn't happen) and at the end of our agreement, mark gave us a list of the things we "paid" for even though most of them shouldn't have been charged for. for example, we saw that a box of unopened spindles were on the list of things we had paid for. when asked about it, Adam threw the box our the front door. even though they were  nice guys, i feel it was the overwhelming amount of work that eventually ended things the way they were. either way we had a bad experience with this company.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Darryl Somcher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVmyzU64Pa9Luc8qsryhCjbbaO0c0fkPmmWqxLwDGcqHvIGi69j=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were dismayed to find that our 10-year-old roof was leaking because of the poor workmanship of the roofers that did the job.  We then had to struggle with the choice between either fixing or replacing it.  Based on a roofing company’s recommendation, we contacted On Top Inspections and, after Troy's very thorough inspection, detailed report (with pictures), and unbiased recommendations, we knew exactly what needed to happen.

We knew we had no choice but to replace the roof and Troy helped us through that whole process – from creating specs and getting quotes to inspecting the work and communicating to the roofers at multiple stages during the replacement.   Because of Troy’s service, the whole process was worry & stress-free and we are now 100% confident in our new roof.

Troy was extremely professional, prepared, and communicated with us every step of the way. After meeting him, his extensive experience and expertise in the industry will be obvious to you.   The high-level of service went beyond our expectations – he even followed up after final inspection and after being paid to make sure everything was perfect.

The only regret we have is not using his services years ago for the original roof  – it would have saved us a lot of money by not having to replace it a second time.  I would never consider doing any more roof work without his involvement. Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lorisa Sarmiento","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKbujtwpKBocJlriy5AxaZTocNLh-NUUVz_laeiebFPuPTO0w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our 36 unit strata complex hired Troy to oversee the roofing of all our units in early 2019.

Troy met with our council and gave us advice on what we needed to get a top quality roof installed that would last several decades.  Troy did the quote specifications for our complex and gave us a list of highly rated companies that we should have bid on the project.

I have to say Troy did an outstanding job on the entire project with providing regular inspections during all stages for each set of buildings and submitting reports with aerial photos and comments on how the project was proceeding.  Communication was excellent and he reinspected as required to insure any deficiencies were corrected.  His attention to detail was outstanding and we know we have a roof that was installed properly and will last for years to come.  Communication was excellent!!

When talking to other members of our strata council we all agreed it was money very well spent and we had no idea how complex the entire process would be. We had no idea just what needed to be done to get a new roof installed.

The project is complete and highly recommend Troy for anyone contemplating ANY roofing project.

Don Hills
Vernon BC","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"D McAllister","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLkd52nszSQWS3aQ7pTRmEVBJvS3dQxDNfeJ3OtXFkeGM4kdA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are so thankful for Troy at On Top Roof Inspections and recommend him to anyone thinking about starting a roof project, or in the midst of one.  He saved us from a disaster in the making.  We hired Troy to do a final inspection for our new roof.  Troy was reliable, professional, and extremely thorough.  He found multiple areas of inadequacies, which would have led to severe water damage in our newly renovated home.  Troy provided a comprehensive report in a timely manner, and assisted with communications with the contracted Roof company to ensure that the roof was completed properly.  He was available to answer our questions, and he was thoughtful about finding cost effective solutions to fix the problem areas.  Troy Hovey is a trusted name in our world!

Our only regret was not hiring Troy at the very beginning of the project. He can assess your roof, and help find the right contractor for your roofing needs.  He does on-site interim inspections, ensuring that the job is completed properly each step of the way, and a final inspection which will give you peace of mind that your roof is complete to industry high quality standards.  Certainly worth every dollar spent, as he will save you costs in the end.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pawel Matonog AR","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXq_eVQUMeu6KEhaX3riPGNhiyVgQNKlLOFvTDXniXNULHGtt8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have completed numerous repairs for clients in the Kelowna area that were initiated by the inspections reports completed by On Top (meaning: I was contacted by the client directly after the report was provided to them.  I have never met or worked with On Top Inspections).

I have found them to be the most thorough & accurate in diagnosing problems in all the years I've been in the roofing business.

It is very clear to me that a lot of work is put into creating these reports and they are completed by a seasoned individual that understands the roofing trade and products.

HIGHLY recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ken Oliver Consulting Ltd","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJXt8Vh4vA4Hg89-0_smuPvDGR4YIQx_NTIPfitEAGiGj9c=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was very pleased with the thoroughness of the report and the fact that Troy fixed a few minor items while he was up on the roof doing the inspection. The report arrived the day after the inspection.
Money well spent and I would have no hesitation to recommend this firm.","Images":null,"When":""}]
